title: The World Government’s Shadow
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Children, Unknown person #4, Loki, Unknown person #5, King Harald, Shanks as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Now children can laugh and study instead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's like a totally different country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The old customs, our backwards traditions...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of those bad practices from the Warrior era will be thrown away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh... but I kinda like the whole warrior's pride part.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's really cool.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You should cherish your culture...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you get it, IDA?! It's that very culture that's kept us from marrying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I can't accept it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He he he he he he he he...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: _You always did say you wanted to make me your legal wife_

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KOFF_ KOFF... that really is the sweetest thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're sooo cute!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: What about Loki?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll always be hajrudin's kid brother. Won't he?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In my heart, I've always thought of him like that... hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: feelings like that... keep my heart full.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's what's kept me going all this time..;)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But don't worry. It's okay.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: You're everybody's King Harald!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And you're almost there, right???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's right, IDA!! It won't be long...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Soon we'll be connected with the whole world!! Our world will be tens of thousands of times bigger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then we can go traveling together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...just like the old days.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That sounds amazing. �

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: I'm looking forward to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Me too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 14 years ago - The Holy Land of Mary Geoise

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: Shanks is missing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Indeed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: HAD HE COMPLETEED HIS LAST MISSION...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: HE WOULD HAVE BEEN FORMALLY KNIGHTED.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you were our next choice, that opportunity now falls to you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What will you do?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll naturally accept the honor of being one of God's knights!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Doing that will secure Elbaf's membership status!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Congratulations then. The great one has agreed to trust in you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's been a long process!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll be remembered as a king who brought great change to Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Well, to be honest...

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
